请填写天数: Please fill in the number of days
请输入角色名称搜索: Please enter a role name to search for
自动转交人至少需要包含一位当前操作人之外的用户，否则截止规则设置失效: The automatic handover person must include at least one user other than the current operator, otherwise the deadline rule setting will become invalid
工作流启用失败,审批节点配置异常: 选择的视图无效: Workflow activation failed, approval node configuration exception: the selected view is invalid
删除节点后，所有相关节点配置都将被重置，需要重新配置这些节点。请确认要执行此操作: After deleting nodes, all related node configurations will be reset and these nodes need to be reconfigured. Please confirm to perform this operation
小数位数不能超过: The number of decimal places cannot exceed
自定义菜单关联主模型的字段权限，默认全部可见、可编辑: Custom menu associated with field permissions for the main model, default to all visible and editable
请输入子流程名称: Please enter a sub process name
修改为不保存和流程结束保存时会清空引用该数据源的设置: Modify to not save and clear the settings referencing the data source when saving at the end of the process
不能小于起始日期(含偏移量): Cannot be less than the start date (including offset)
当前节点,数据可能已变更未保存: Current node, data may have changed but not saved
请填写描述信息: Please fill in the description information
选择日期字段时,需要指定触发的时刻: When selecting the date field, it is necessary to specify the triggering time
配置流程参数，作为临时字段，可以存放某个字段值，或计算结果，或接收其他流程中传过: Configure process parameters as temporary fields that can store a certain field value, calculate results, or receive values passed from other processes
请选择所属应用: Please select the application you belong to
自定义该权限组包含菜单下的哪些操作权限: Customize which operation permissions are included in this permission group under the menu
自定义菜单关联主模型的数据过滤条件，如未设置，将视为拥有全部数据权限。: The data filtering criteria for the custom menu associated with the main model, if not set, will be considered as having full data permissions.
延时一段时间: Delay for a period of time
字段不允许有重复的key: Field does not allow duplicate keys
无法处理没有运行时动作的点击动作: Cannot handle click actions without runtime actions
不能大于结束日期含偏移量: Cannot be greater than the end date with offset
应用正在开发中: The application is currently under development
确认要删除吗?: Are you sure you want to delete it?
审批节点配置异常：选择的视图无效: Workflow activation failed, approval node configuration exception: Invalid view selected Approval node configuration exception: Invalid view selected
未获取数据时处理: Process when data is not obtained
不能输入超过最大安全值的数: Cannot enter a number that exceeds the maximum safe value
该组件配置了最大上传数量为: This component is configured with a maximum upload quantity of
或签（一名审批人同意或拒绝即可）: Or sign (one approver can agree or refuse)
不能输入超过最小安全值的数: Cannot enter a number that exceeds the minimum safe value
输入通知收件人手机号，回车保存: Enter the notification recipient's phone number and press Enter to save
可更新数据源可选节点计算: Optional node calculation for updatable data sources
找不到指定更新函数: Unable to find the specified update function
根据节点内容生成描述: Generate description based on node content
记得及时处理待办喔: Remember to handle the to-do list in a timely manner
子流程可更新数据源可选节点计算: Sub process updatable data source optional node calculation
审批可退回,可选数据源 等等: Approval can be returned, optional data sources, etc
节点结束时发送: Send at the end of the node
节点执行完保存该业务数据: Save the business data after the node completes execution
在分支下新增or删除第一个节点时,指定分支所在的坐标. 不指定认为在分支的汇合节: When adding or deleting the first node under a branch, specify the coordinates where the branch is located Do not specify adding nodes after the merging node of the branch
参数名称规则：参数名称必须以字母开头，支持输入数字和下划线，不支持输入汉字: Parameter name rule: Parameter names must start with a letter, support inputting numbers and underscores, and do not support inputting Chinese characters
请选择日期时间: Please select a date and time
会签（需所有审批人同意才为同意，一名审批人拒绝即为拒绝）: Countersign (requires the consent of all approvers to be considered as consent, and a refusal by one approver is considered a rejection)
为当前权限组添加角色: Add a role to the current permission group
复制需要通知的时间或群聊机器人的rul地址，如：钉钉可在钉钉群设置中的机器人管理: Copy the required notification time or the URL address of the group chat robot. For example, in the robot management section of the nail group settings, add a robot and copy the corresponding Webhook address.
多人审批时的审批方式: Approval method when multiple people approve
不支持删除正在使用的: Deleting in use is not supported
子流程执行完毕后，再开始下一节点: After the sub process is completed, proceed to the next node
子流程和后续的节点同时进行: Simultaneous execution of sub processes and subsequent nodes
工作流触发方式配置异常: Abnormal configuration of workflow triggering method
填写操作提交后执行函数: Execute the function after submitting the fill in operation
节点配置异常时发布报错。工作流启用失败,审批节点配置异常: 选择的视图无效: Publish an error when the node configuration is abnormal. Workflow activation failed, approval node configuration exception: the selected view is invalid
标准化、可扩展的技术体系与协议，让数据服务应用的集成畅通无阻: Standardized and scalable technology system and protocols enable seamless integration of data service applications
没找到想要的页面？点我去创建，自动完成绑定: Can't find the desired page? Click me to create and automatically complete the binding
批量创建或更新记录(分批次)，返回对象列表: Batch create or update records (in batches), return object list
标签已经存在，不可重复: The label already exists and cannot be duplicated
当前节点与上一节点人重复时，默认同意: When the current node is duplicated with the previous node, it is agreed by default
请输入图标名称搜索: Please enter an icon name to search for
输入通知接收人手机号，回车保存: Enter the notification recipient's phone number and press Enter to save
整个流程执行完保存该业务数据: Save the business data after the entire process is completed
失败 , 流程发布失败, 审批节点配置异常: 未选择审批模型: Fail , Process publishing failed, approval node configuration exception: no approval model selected
输入通知收件人邮箱，回车保存: Enter the notification recipient's email and press Enter to save
配置流程参数，作为临时字段，可以存放某个字段值，或计算结果，或接收其他流程中传过: Configure process parameters as temporary fields that can store a certain field value, calculate results, or receive values passed from other processes;
易用、可扩展、一体化: Easy to use, scalable, and integrated
向模型中新增数据后继续执行: Continue execution after adding data to the model
仅满足以下条件的进入流程: Entry process that only meets the following conditions
没有已安装的控制台，点击这里去安装: There are no installed consoles. Click here to install them
输入的不是一个数字: The input is not a number
关联父流程的子流程节点id: Associate the sub process node ID of the parent process
将搜索视图的筛选条件收藏: Favorite the filter criteria for the search view
待更新的下个节点信息,不允许修改节点id,只允许修改表达式,名称等等: The information of the next node to be updated is not allowed to modify the node ID, only the expression, name, and so on
删除后无法恢复，请确认执行此操作？: After deletion, it cannot be restored. Are you sure to perform this operation?
搜索字段为多对多类型时，只允许使用主表格中的字段进行搜索: When the search field is of many to many type, only the fields in the main table are allowed for searching
流程设计保存时，提示更新成功未翻译: When saving the process design, prompt for successful update but not translated
赋能企业自建一体化IT体系: Empowering enterprises to build their own integrated IT system
修改流程所属应用后新触发流程变更，旧数据所属应用仍然保持不变: After modifying the application to which the process belongs, a new process change is triggered, and the application to which the old data belongs remains unchanged
输入的不是一个整数: The input is not an integer
在分支节点的情况下,下一个节点是汇合节点: In the case of branch nodes, the next node is the convergence node
请输入1-500之间的整数: Please enter an integer between 1 and 500
请输入权限组描述: Please enter a description of the permission group
请输入权限组名称: Please enter the name of the permission group
不保存该业务数据: Do not save this business data
是否切换成对应的主题？: Do you want to switch to the corresponding theme?
工作流启用失败,未配置请求方式: Workflow activation failed, request method not configured
业务数据id不存在: Business data ID does not exist
不能小于起始日期含偏移量: Cannot be less than the start date with offset
请上传jpg、png格式的图片，文件大小不超过5MB: Please upload images in jpg or png format, with a file size not exceeding 5MB
请填写分钟数: Please fill in the number of minutes
易用的可视化应用设计器，帮助企业搭建应用与产品: Easy to use visual application designer to help enterprises build applications and products
请填写小时数: Please fill in the number of hours
在应用中心点击星标收藏应用: Click on the star icon in the application center to bookmark the application
仅保证在一个流程中唯一: Only guarantee uniqueness within one process
该组件配置了可上传类型为: This component is configured with an uploadable type of
至少要有一个字段: At least one field is required
如：钉钉群机器人管理中勾选加签，复制对应的密钥: For example, in the management of nail group robots, check 'add signature' and copy the corresponding key
删除权限组将清空关联角色的对应权限，确认删除吗？: Deleting a permission group will clear the corresponding permissions of the associated role. Are you sure to delete it?
审批操作提交后执行函数: Execute function after submitting approval operation
确定删除吗？: Are you sure to delete it?
当前节点与历史节点人重复，默认同意: The current node is duplicated with the historical node person, and the default consent is given
暂无收藏的应用: There are currently no favorite apps available
失败,未处理的系统异常, 当前工作流无参数定义，不允许设置参数: Fail,Unhandled system exception, current workflow has no parameter definition and parameter setting is not allowed
会签（一名审批人同意即为同意，需所有审批人拒绝才为拒绝）: Countersign (if one approver agrees, it means they agree, and if all approvers refuse, it means they refuse)
批量操作下只能操作角色: Only roles can be operated in batch operations

不支持删除低代码: Removing low code is not supported
该菜单未配置页面或动作: The menu is not configured with pages or actions
当前节点与发起人重复时，默认同意: When the current node is duplicated with the initiator, it is agreed by default
新增or重置为1,标记节点业务数据都为空: Added or reset to 1, marked node business data is empty

超出标签最大个数: Exceeded the maximum number of labels
数据源节点变化,导致引用节点重置: The data source node changes, causing the reference node to reset
